title: Pocket Edition Alpha GUI
description: The classic Pocket Edition GUI for Java Edition!
body:
This resource pack stylizes the game's GUIs to look reminiscent of the GUI from the alpha versions of _Minecraft: Pocket Edition._ It's nostalgic and also pretty easy on the eyes!

This is a forward-port of the [Pocket](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/pocket-6166688/) texture pack made by _bobatealee_ for beta 1.7.3. The inventory, container, crafting, furnace, button and dispenser GUIs were created by them, and the post-release GUI elements were created by me!

![The title screen for Minecraft: Pocket Edition Alpha.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df65fffc8e5bd28eb23a4a1fa6122b774ee43ca9.png)

![The title screen for the Pocket Edition Alpha GUI resource pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c07215d9ace1454e8a15d96327881a6b30648d4a_0.webp)

![The survival inventory.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0b1758742ef7ca337b36f4a9750a70480eee343_0.webp)

![The crafting table GUI.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee8ac23eb341c95ad3a1dd21f6e6dec3a99a23dd.png)

_More previews are available in the gallery tab._
